A BRIEF EF0 TORNADO WAS CONFIRMED AFTER A SURVEY OF DAMAGE AND A REVIEW OF AVAILABLE RADAR DATA AND SECURITY CAMERA FOOTAGE. DAMAGE WAS CHARACTERIZED BY REMOVAL OF SHINGLES AND FASCIA FROM HOMES...UPLIFT OF A GAS STATION CANOPY...A TRUCK UPLIFTED...ROTATED AND FLIPPED ON ITS SIDE...DESTRUCTION OF FENCES AND CONSIDERABLE SNAPPAGE AND UPROOTING OF BOTH SOFTWOOD AND HARDWOOD TREES. PATH WIDTH WAS MAXIMALLY ABOUT 250 YD...PATH LENGTH JUST OVER A MILE AND MAXIMUM WIND OF 80 MPH. SEE PNSPBZ FOR DE
PART OF SHEETZ GAS STATION CANOPY RIPPED OFF AND DAMAGED. 2 VEHICLES WERE FLIPPED ON THEIR SIDE AT THE GAS STATION. SEVERAL TREES WERE ALSO DOWN IN THE TOWN OF HERMITAGE. (CORRECTED REMARKS)
PART OF SHEETZ GAS STATION CANOPY RIPPED OFF AND DAMAGED. 2 VEHICLES WERE FLIPPED ON THEIR SIDE AT THE GAS STATION. SEVERE TREES WERE ALSO DOWN IN THE TOWN OF HERMITAGE.
